title: tetraria rottboellioides
intro: Tetraria rottboellioides, also known as the Red Button Sedge, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the sedge family, Cyperaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is also believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting digestion, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. In traditional medicine, Tetraria rottboellioides is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, where the dried plant material is steeped in hot water to release its medicinal compounds.
